message:
refactor(stored_task): add AnyStoredTask::is_local() method (bd-19mg7)

Centralizes local task classification into AnyStoredTask::is_local(&self)
instead of inline matches!() patterns. Replaces the matches! call in
three_lane.rs execute() with the new method. Adds 3 unit tests verifying
classification for Global/Local variants and stability across poll.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
